name: libhydrasdr1
title: libhydrasdr1
summary: HydraSDR RFOne software defined radio receiver - library
description:
HydraSDR RFOne software defined radio receiver - library
HydraSDR RFOne is an open source Software Defined Radio that can
receive 24-1850 MHz.
It is a High Speed USB device powered by the USB bus.
.
This package contains the shared library.
